example: He passed by puzzled birds as he flew up toward the clouds.

english: n. a section of a town or city
example: He lost sight of the streets and the trees and the whole neighborhood.

english: v. to move quickly or suddenly
example: He thought he might be zapped into a black hole or bump into a satellite.

english: n. any point in the air
v. to be on every side of someone or something
example: He was surrounded by white clouds.

english: v. to say something in a rough, low voice
n. the hair that grows on a man's cheeks and chin
example: "Hey! What are you doing here, young man?" asked one of the men with a long beard.

english: v. to say something in a quiet, unclear voice
n. bad weather in which there is a lot of rain, snow, etc.
example: "I can hear the storm in your head," the bearded man said.
"Boy, isn't that noisy!" exclaimed the other man.
